html:
The Umbrella is a Survival item that negates Sanity loss caused by the Rain while equipped. If playing as WX-78, the Umbrella will prevent damage caused by Rain and prevent being struck by Lightning. It requires 6 Twigs, 1 Pig Skin, and 2 Silk to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. 

The Umbrella can also be used as a melee weapon, but this is not recommended as it deals only 17 damage and breaks after 20 uses. Otherwise, the Umbrella will never break no matter how often the player uses it.


Downloadable Content

In DLCs the Umbrella slows the rate at which the player gains Wetness by 90% and provides moderate protection from Overheating. It now also loses durability when passively held, like other Dress items. It can be repaired with a Sewing Kit for 83% durability. It will no longer prevent WX-78 from being struck by Lightning.

Because the durability has been tied to time being equipped, the umbrella is no longer a weapon, and attacking with it causes a generic punch damage (10 by default), costing no extra durability when used this way.

In the Hamlet DLC, Umbrellas can be bought for 10 Oincs at the Pigg and Pigglet's General Store.

Tips

  • For 100% water resistance, a player can hold an umbrella while wearing a Battle Helm, Beefalo Hat, Breezy Vest, Football Helmet, Miner Hat, Rain Hat, Shelmet, Spiderhat, Straw Hat, Summer Frest, or Top Hat.

Trivia

  • The Umbrella was added during A Little Rain Must Fall update of Don't Starve's beta testing period.
  • Using Pig Skin to make an Umbrella may be a reference to Robinson Crusoe's umbrella.

Gallery

  • The Umbrella on the ground and equipped.
  • Wilson with an Umbrella in the rain so Sanity stays intact.
  • The update A Little Rain Must Fall introduced rain and the Umbrella.
  • Wes figurine with an Umbrella.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“This will keep my hair dry, at least.”
–Wilson

“The rain hurts my mighty skin.”

“The clouds weep.”

“THIS WILL KEEP ME RUST FREE.”

“A simple apparatus for keeping dry.”

“This will keep my beard dry, eh?”
–Woodie

–Maxwell
“A portable canopy for the sun and the rain.”
–Wagstaff
“Rain prötectiön made fröm the tröphy öf a hunt.”

“I will try to remember not to open indoors.”
–Warly
“I do like ta keep me powder dry.”
–Woodlegs

–Wilba

“Because you never know when it's going to rain. Unless you check the weather reports.”
–Wheeler
“It serves its purpose.”
–Winona
“No soggy imps on this fine day!”
–Wortox
“Umm-brella keep rain away!”
–Wurt
“It'll stop the raindrops from falling on my head.”
–Walter
“A handy little rain napper.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ô là một vật phẩm Sinh tồn có tác dụng loại bỏ sự mất Tinh Thần do Mưa gây ra khi được trang bị. Nếu chơi với tư cách WX-78, Ô sẽ ngăn chặn thiệt hại do Mưa gây ra và ngăn ngừa bị sét đánh. Nó cần 6 Cành Cây, 1 Da Lợn và 2 Tơ để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu.

Because the durability has been tied to time being equipped, the umbrella is no longer a weapon, and attacking with it causes a generic punch damage (10 by default), costing no extra durability when used this way.
